spec: Receive a POST to /webhook/intake, set a status field to 'received', and POST the body to https://example.com/inbox.
Every weekday at 9am pull https://api.example.com/feed, check if items.length > 0, and if so POST a summary to https://example.com/notify.
When a webhook fires, run a small JS function that uppercases the body.text, then set the result onto a 'normalized' field.
On webhook, branch on whether body.priority equals 'urgent'; if urgent POST to https://example.com/urgent, otherwise POST to https://example.com/standard.
Every hour, pull https://api.example.com/health, run a code node that parses status, and set ok=true if status is 200.
